evidence: specificity 6/10 — Most of the post is strongly anchored in named places, prices, and logistics—but Day 5's lunch entry collapses into vagueness ('Casual spots near Kailua Beach') after the body text correctly names Kalapawai Market. The bullet contradicts the specificity of the paragraph above it and is the most extractable failure point. The rewrite pulls the named location already present in the body copy into the bullet where readers are most likely scanning.
